name: AuthKit
absorption_note: AuthKit is the successor to the archived Authvault repo (c7994b9, 2026-06-20). Created 2026-06-24 to receive the unmerged GAP work. FR-AUTHV-018 (originally GAP-008 PKCE state binding at middleware) landed in commit 064b310 with 11 unit tests. GAP-009 (RS256/ES256 alg-confusion defense) and GAP-010 (middleware adapter docs) were already merged into Authvault main; they remain canonical on Authvault. Future auth work (AUT-SOTA-001..007: key rotation, OIDC discovery, WebAuthn, TOTP, KMS-backed secrets, DPoP, rate-limiting) lands in this crate.
rationale: Canonical Rust auth boundary (active). New auth work goes here. Authvault is now read-only history. The crate is intentionally minimal today: one hexagonal port (SessionStore) and one tower middleware (enforce_pkce_state_session). Per-adapter expansion is the AUT-SOTA series.
ci_state: newly-created; CI not yet configured (SOTA-001 unit)
